subjects.description: steam train leaving the Glenfinnan Viaduct
subjects.appearance_details: historic locomotive with dark metal body, plume of steam, connected passenger carriages, and moving wheels on the elevated track
subjects.relationship: main moving subject crossing away from the historic bridge
subjects.location: on the railway line over the arch covered Glenfinnan Viaduct in the Scottish Highlands
subjects.relative_size: long train scale, large on the viaduct but small compared with surrounding mountains
subjects.orientation: traveling along the curve of the viaduct toward open highland track
subjects.action: leaves the viaduct while trailing steam through the clear sky
subjects.state_changes: train advances across arches, steam plume expands and drifts, carriages follow the curve
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: dark painted metal, polished trim, soot marks, and vapor cloud texture
subjects.facial_features: round front boiler face, headlamp, chimney, and buffers

subjects.appearance_details: stone arched viaduct with repeating spans, weathered masonry, and elevated rail line
subjects.relationship: landmark structure supporting the train journey
subjects.location: crossing the green Highland valley between Mallaig and Fort William
subjects.relative_size: massive bridge structure spanning the valley, larger than the train
subjects.orientation: curving across the landscape from foreground to middle distance
subjects.action: holds the rail line as the train departs across it
subjects.state_changes: remains still while shadows and train steam move across its arches
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: weathered stone blocks with sunlit rough texture
subjects.facial_features: repeating stone arches and parapet line

background_setting: The Scottish Highlands around Glenfinnan, with lush greenery, rocky mountains, blue sky, bright sun, and the historic arched viaduct carrying the railway line.

lighting.conditions: Clear sunny daylight with crisp shadows on stone arches, highlights on train metal, and bright green landscape color.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Clear sunny daylight with crisp shadows on stone arches, highlights on train metal, and bright green landscape color.

aesthetics.composition: Picturesque heritage railway scene, scenic travel nostalgia, rich green Highlands, blue sky, and textured historic stone.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Picturesque heritage railway scene, scenic travel nostalgia, rich green Highlands, blue sky, and textured historic stone.

cinematography.camera_motion: Wide cinematic landscape shot from a hillside vantage point, holding the viaduct curve and train movement in one clean composition.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Photorealistic scenic railway text to video.
artistic_style: Classic travel documentary realism with nostalgic steam train atmosphere.
context: A steam train departs the Glenfinnan Viaduct on a bright day, showcasing the historic bridge and Scottish Highland scenery.

actions.description: The steam train appears on the arched viaduct, dark locomotive bright against the green valley.
It rolls along the curve and begins leaving the bridge, steam drifting back over the stone arches.
The carriages follow off the viaduct toward the highland track as the plume thins in the blue sky.

segments.description: Establish the Glenfinnan Viaduct and steam train in bright Highland scenery.
segments.key_changes: Locomotive becomes the moving focal point, steam begins trailing.

segments.description: Show the train leaving the arch covered bridge.
segments.key_changes: Train advances along the curve, steam spreads across arches, carriages follow.
segments.camera: Slow pan following the train while keeping the viaduct visible.

segments.description: End with the train moving beyond the viaduct into the landscape.
segments.key_changes: Viaduct recedes as train exits, plume stretches into clear sky.
segments.camera: Hold wide composition with a slight continued pan.

temporal_caption: A historic steam train leaves the Glenfinnan Viaduct under a blue sky, trailing steam across the green Scottish Highlands.
audio_description: Steam chuffs, wheel rhythm on rails, faint whistle, mountain breeze, and distant birds over the valley.
